zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Underwood於大約1581年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Joseph Underwood27歲，母親Elizabeth Salmon29歲。她於1602年7月1日與Thomas Ormsby在英國林可爾史爾阿福德結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1656年8月19日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可布拉德維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Underwood于大约1581年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Joseph Underwood27岁，母亲Elizabeth Salmon29岁。她于1602年7月1日与Thomas Ormsby在英国林可爾史爾阿福德结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1656年8月19日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可布拉德維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Underwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived below a wood on a hillside, from Middle English under + wude, wode ‘wood’, or a habitational name for someone from any place so named.

History: Joseph Underwood emigrated from England to Watertown, MA, in 1637. William Underwood came from England to Concord, MA, before 1640, later settling in Chelmsford, MA. In VA, the name was established by Thomas William Underwood, who came from Norfolk, England, in 1675.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Underwood was born about 1581, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Joseph Underwood, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Salmon, was 29. She married Thomas Ormsby on 1 July 1602, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 19 August 1656, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bradwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Underwood est née environ 1581, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Joseph Underwood, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Salmon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Ormsby le 1 juillet 1602, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1656, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Bradwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Underwood um 1581 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joseph Underwood 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Salmon 29. Sie hat am 1. Juli 1602 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England Thomas Ormsby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. August 1656 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bradwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Underwood è nata il circa 1581 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Joseph Underwood, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Salmon, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Ormsby il 1 luglio 1602, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1656, nel Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Bradwell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Underwoodが約1581年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Joseph Underwoodは27歳，母Elizabeth Salmonは29歳であった。1602年7月1日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードでThomas Ormsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1656年8月19日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスブラドウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Underwood(이)가 대략 1581년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Underwood(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Salmon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1602년 7월 1일 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에서 Thomas Ormsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1656년 8월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브라드웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Underwood nasceu aproximadamente 1581, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Joseph Underwood, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Salmon, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Ormsby em 1 de julho de 1602, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1656, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Bradwell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Underwood родилась около 1581 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Joseph Underwood было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Salmon, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Ormsby 1 июля 1602 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 19 августа 1656 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности брадвелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.11 Apr 1616: mai le 1616 e o'o I le 1617

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Underwood nació aproximadamente 1581, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Joseph Underwood, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Salmon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Ormsby el 1 de julio de 1602, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1656, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Bradwell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
